calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Continued To Nov-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Oliver Wong, administrator in pro per (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Wong reported that he had been prepared to file the final account and report but recently discovered additional assets, including some held overseas in Hong Kong, which required further documentation and processing. He estimated that it would take approximately twelve months to complete administration.

The Court continued the matter to November 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
